CustomField.description: References a Waterfall_Rule__mdt record by DeveloperName (e.g. STANDARD, CASH_SWEEP, DEFAULT_EVENT, ENFORCEMENT). This determines the priority order for allocating borrower payments across penalty, fee, interest, and principal. Default is STANDARD at origination. Can only be changed via Loan_Amendment — direct edit is blocked by guard trigger. Stored as Text because Salesforce does not support MDT lookups as field types.
CustomField.label: Waterfall Rule
